item.title: Supporters where fake?!....
item.description: A massive Europol takedown and rising AI-generated content reveal how synthetic activity is reshaping the internet.

item.title: Wrestling Match That Ended in Tragedy
item.description: Perro Aguayo Jr.’s final match against Rey Mysterio became one of professional wrestling’s most heartbreaking moments.
